title: My Stepmother Stole My Lodge Via Forged Deed, Evicted Me On Christmas. So I Got It For $1
description: I poured my entire $140K inheritance into my father's lodge, only for my stepmother to forge a deed and evict me on Christmas Eve. I sued, uncovered the fraud, and bought her share for $1 during their divorce. Now I run a women's writing retreat there with a solstice bonfire. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #Karma
thumb_text: SHE EVICTED ME ON CHRISTMAS. I BOUGHT THE LODGE FOR $1.
pinned_comment: What would you do if you poured your entire $140,000 inheritance into a family lodge and then got evicted on Christmas Eve because of a forged deed? Tell me your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: I INHERITED $140K AND POURED IT ALL INTO THE LODGE
